name: stadiummind-ai
description: StadiumMind AI - The AI Operating System for FIFA World Cup 2026 Stadiums

scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @stadiummind/shared && npm run build --workspace @stadiummind/api && npm run build --workspace @stadiummind/web
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run start --workspace @stadiummind/api" "npm run start --workspace @stadiummind/web"
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @stadiummind/web && npm run lint --workspace @stadiummind/api
